title: DC Hits 105°F on July 4th. No One Is Ready.
script: 105 degrees on July 4th? A massive heat dome is building over the eastern United States right now — and it's going to peak on the worst possible day. Washington, D.C. is forecast to hit 105 degrees Fahrenheit on Independence Day. New York City could reach 102. Philadelphia might tie its all-time June record of 104. That's not just uncomfortable — that's dangerous. The National Weather Service says heat index values could reach 115 degrees in some spots, meaning it feels even worse than the thermometer shows. At least 200 million Americans are in the path of this thing. The dome is already baking Chicago, Minneapolis, and St. Louis. It's only going to intensify as it shifts east. So if you've got fireworks plans this week — is your water bottle ready?
